prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins in a black-and-white domestic interior. A person is exercising on a stationary bike in a living-room-like space with a sofa, curtains, shelves, and a reflective floor. Large colored product branding appears over the monochrome scene: “ICYHOT,” with “ICY” in blue, “H” in yellow, and “OT” in orange-red.

The next shot is a close-up, still in black and white, of a woman exercising. The camera angle is low and partially obstructed by the exercise equipment. She appears focused and slightly strained, wearing a sleeveless athletic top, with her arms extended toward the bike handles.

The commercial then cuts to a product shot on a black background: a white bottle with a blue cap labeled “ICYHOT DRY SPRAY.” Small text at the lower right reads “Use as directed.” The bottle is centered and isolated, emphasizing the product packaging.

Next, the ad shows a color demonstration of the spray being applied to a person’s upper back/shoulder area. The person is viewed from behind, wearing a dark tank top. A hand holds the Icy Hot spray can near the left shoulder. Blue circular graphic rings appear on the skin where the spray is aimed, visually indicating application or targeted relief. Small on-screen text includes “Dramatization” at the lower left and “Use as directed.” at the lower right.

The following frame presents another product-and-spokesperson composition on a black background. The Icy Hot Dry Spray bottle appears on the left, alongside large white text reading “DRY SPRAY.” On the right is a bald man in a black shirt, shown from the chest up, facing the camera with his arms forward/resting. The image is mostly monochrome except for the product label. Small text at the bottom reads “Use as directed.”

The screen then goes black briefly.

The final frame shows a product comparison or transition graphic on a black background. At the top is the Icy Hot logo, followed by the phrase “SAME POWERFUL PAIN RELIEF” in large blue capital letters. On the left is an older-looking “ICYHOT LIDOCAINE PATCH” box, and on the right is a newer-looking “ICYHOT MAX LIDOCAINE PATCH” box. A blue arrow points from the left package to the right package. Small text near the bottom reads “Use as directed.”
